The complex The Title Adora Rawai consists of 8 low-rise buildings with 4 floors each, containing 210 modern apartments and one 3-storey clubhouse. The architecture of Adora Rawai harmoniously combines Mediterranean motifs and modern elegance. Every detail is thought out for your maximum comfort. The interiors, which harmoniously combine functionality and aesthetics, create an atmosphere of comfort and sophistication. The landscape design of the complex is imbued with the spirit of nature: lush greenery, calm waters and beautifully decorated recreation areas create an atmosphere of peace and harmony. In Adora Rawai you will find not only a home, but also a lifestyle that will allow you to enjoy every moment.

Location

A prestigious location just a few steps from the famous Rawai Beach on Phuket Island. All the necessary infrastructure for a comfortable life and recreation is within easy reach: shops, cafes, bars, spas, shopping malls, schools, beach clubs and much more. The Adora Rawai complex is surrounded by the best seafood restaurants. Here, along the coastline, boats are waiting for you, ready for exciting trips through crystal clear waters. You can enjoy the beautiful views of Coral Island, Racha Yai and Bon Island, getting an unforgettable impression of the beauty of nature.

Distance to beaches:

Location

The complex is located in a prestigious area, close to Layan and Bang Tao beaches. Here the marine atmosphere is harmoniously combined with the dynamic urban life. You can enjoy the beauty of the beaches and a variety of entertainment. In the immediate vicinity of the complex are the Porto de Phuket Shopping Center, Boat Avenue, Head Start and UWC International schools, as well as the elite Laguna Phuket Resort complex. The advantageous location of Siamese Bangtao makes it an ideal option for both permanent residence and recreation.

The infrastructure of the complex:

  • Several pools: main pool, children's pool, rooftop pool and shallow pools
  • Restaurant and cafe
  • Lobby with reception area
  • Outdoor cinema
  • Modern gym
  • Treadmill
  • Golf Simulator
  • Paddle tennis Court
  • Sauna, onsen, steam bath and ice bath
  • Pet Walking Park
  • Shuttle service

Studio apartment in a new complex near Layan beach, Phuket

  • Thalang
  • Cherng Talay
1 Bedroom(s)

30 m²
Floor: 2

Introducing a stylish studio apartment of 30.4 sq.m in a new complex located in the prestigious part of Phuket, just 1 km from Layan Beach. This area is renowned for its unique nature and developing infrastructure. Soon, walking trails, bike paths, and stylish beach clubs will appear here, making this location even more attractive for living and investment.

About the Project

The complex includes four residential residences and a hotel managed by the global brand Ramada by Wyndham. This guarantees the highest level of service and amenities. The internal infrastructure of the complex is meticulously designed and includes:

  • A huge fitness center of 700 sq.m
  • A children’s club with outdoor slides and pools
  • A restaurant and café offering a variety of cuisines
  • A banquet hall for events
  • A modern coworking space with a relaxation area and sea view
  • An accessible rooftop with stunning sunset views

About the Apartment

The studio has a well-thought-out layout, making it ideal for both personal living and rental purposes. High ceilings of 2.8 meters and large windows fill the space with light and create a sense of spaciousness. A built-in furniture package is included in the price.

Advantages of This Offer

  • The best price in Phuket during the private sales phase
  • Reservation payment of only 100,000 THB
  • Built-in furniture package included in the price
  • Prestigious location, only 1 km from the sea
  • Rental program with a 30/70 revenue split

Price

The apartment is now available at an exclusive price—starting from 110,000 THB per sq.m, significantly lower than similar offerings in the area. You can purchase a studio in this new complex near Layan Beach with an installment plan until 2027 with a down payment of only 20%.

Submit a request on our website to reserve the apartment at a great price.

Spacious studio apartment with an area of 34 sq.m in the new Vega Condominium complex in Bang Tao district. The design of the project embodies luxury and harmony with nature.  The advantageous location in the tourist area of Phuket island makes the project attractive both for your own residence and for investment.

The infrastructure of the complex:

  • A large fitness center with an area of 900 sq.m.
  • A 24x4 m swimming pool and a 15x4 m children's pool
  • Children's Club
  • Restaurant with conference room
  • Rooftop lounge bar and cinema
  • SPA center
  • Coworking 
  • Underground parking
  • Car Wash
  • Bus shuttle to the beach and back
  • 24-hour security and video surveillance
  • Adaptive environment for people with disabilities
  • A convenient mobile application

There is an opportunity to buy real estate in Phuket in the Vega Condominium complex in installments with an initial payment of 30%.

Due date: 3rd quarter of 2026.
